title: nicotiana axillaris var. nyctaginiflora
intro: Nicotiana axillaris var. nyctaginiflora, also known as the fragrant flower tobacco or night-scented tobacco, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, characterized by its white, yellow, and purple fragrant flowers that bloom in the evening. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nicotiana axillaris var. nyctaginiflora include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make potpourri, perfumes, and other fragrant products.
